title: cardamine obliqua f. alpina
intro: Cardamine obliqua f. alpina, also known as Alpine Bittercress, is a rare, alpine perennial plant in the mustard family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve stomach issues. The health benefits of Cardamine obliqua f. alpina include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce inflammation and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to support digestive health and alleviate symptoms of indigestion and nausea.
